org.apache.paimon.operation

Interface FileStoreScan.Plan

  • Enclosing interface:
    FileStoreScan

    public static interface FileStoreScan.Plan
    Result plan of this scan.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      List<ManifestEntry> files()
      Result ManifestEntry files.
      default List<ManifestEntry> files(FileKind kind)
      Result ManifestEntry files with specific file kind.
      static Map<BinaryRow,Map<Integer,List<DataFileMeta>>> groupByPartFiles(List<ManifestEntry> files)
      Return a map group by partition and bucket.
      ScanMode scanMode() 
      Long snapshotId()
      Snapshot id of this plan, return null if the table is empty or the manifest list is specified.
